_note: Curated mapping from ScoutSuite finding rules to IKI-Gov governance checklist items (presidio-hardened-ikigov-assess). A rule that is CLEAN in a run (no flagged finding) is evidence the corresponding item holds: T5 = 'a security review of the infrastructure and all dependencies has been conducted and findings addressed'; O5 = 'an audit log is maintained, stored immutably, and accessible to authorised auditors'. Rule names mirror <provider>.controls.json and are validated fail-closed against the rule manifest. Edit deliberately: a clean control must genuinely support its item.
